messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0095",
  "title": "2024年",
  "page_index": 27,
  "page_range": "27"
}

Section text:
### 2024年
- 1-10名收入占比：23.45%
- 11-50名收入占比：26.97%
- 51-200名收入占比：26.11%
- 其他移动游戏收入占比：23.46%

message.content: This section provides 2024 quantitative metrics on mobile game revenue distribution by ranking tier. It answers questions regarding: (1) the exact revenue share percentages for mobile games grouped by rank (1–10: 23.45%, 11–50: 26.97%, 51–200: 26.11%, others: 23.46%); (2) how market revenue was distributed across top-performing versus lower-ranked titles in 2024; and (3) the degree of revenue concentration in the mobile gaming sector for that year. Key retrieval targets include the date "2024," the entity "mobile games," ranking-based market segments, and specific percentage metrics. The content serves as statistical evidence for market structure and revenue concentration analysis. No definitions, procedures, claims, tables, or figures are present.
